branching.title: Title
branching.permission_error_description: Your GitHub App needs 'Pull requests: Write' permission. Please accept the new permissions in your GitHub settings.

error.sha: Could not find base branch SHA

status.on_default: You are on the default branch: {branch}

git.admin_only: Only admins and owners can perform this action
git.restore_description_github: This will jump back in time to exactly how your site looked at this moment. Any changes made after this version will be removed.
git.restore_description_gitlab: This will bring back your site to exactly how it looked at this moment. We'll create a new update to make this happen, so your history remains safe.
git.restore_warning_github: ⚠️ Warning: This is a permanent change. All newer updates will be deleted from this branch. Only use this if you want to completely discard recent work.
git.restore_warning_gitlab: ✓ This is safe. Your recent work won't be deleted; we just create a new version based on this old one.
git.undo_description: This will create a new update that reverses everything changed in this specific version.
git.undo_warning: ✓ This is safe! We'll add a new version to your history that cancels out these specific changes, keeping everything else intact.
